mindfulness: Focus on your shoulders. As you exhale, imagine the tension melting away.
Notice your jaw. Is it tight or relaxed? Just focus on it for a brief moment.
Direct all awareness to your breath. Feel the air enter and leave your lungs.
Take one deep breath. Try to feel the oxygen reach your stomach and soften it.
Check your hands. If they're clenched, release them now and notice the shift.
Focus on the feeling of your feet on the floor. Feel the earth holding you steady.
Find the sensation of your heartbeat. Feel it without moving.
Direct your focus to both of your arms at once. Balance your awareness.
Imagine you are running your hand over a smooth stone. Feel the texture in your mind.
Direct 100% of your awareness to the weight of your phone in your hand.
Close your eyes and visualize a field of pure, calm blue. Keep it steady.
Visualize yourself in a quiet forest. Engage your senses: what do you see and hear?
Fill your mind with the color white. Let it be the only thing you see for a moment.
In your mind's eye, recall the sensation of cool water on your face.
Transport yourself to a mountain peak. Take a deep breath of the cold air.
Scan your neck and back. Is the tension there higher now than when you started?
Break the trance: Find the sensation in your toes. Shift focus to your body.
Close your eyes. Visualize a restful green to clear the digital noise.
Put the phone down. Imagine the feeling of a warm breeze against your skin.
Scan your posture. Is your weight balanced or shifted to one side?
Breathe deeply. Notice the sensation of being alive right now.
Check your breathing. Consciously slow it down for a moment.
Focus on your whole body at once. Re-center by feeling your physical presence.
Visualization: You are on a quiet beach. The screen is gone. Stay there.
Find your pulse in your wrist. Can you feel it without moving a finger?
Your brain is in a loop. Scan your chest. Exhale the digital fog.
Recall the texture of tree bark. Let the real world pull you out of the screen.
Transport yourself to a library. Use this as a grounding reset for this session.
Reconnect to the room around you. Notice three objects you can see.
Visualize a soft golden light. This is a reset. Reclaim your focus.
